metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2217
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Local activation GTPase shown with OE of mEGFP-tagged RHOA (FRET assay with Raichu probes).

Fig.3: "Rich2 selectively regulates Rac1"
Although not regulated by Rich2, presence of activated RhoA can be seen in the heads of dendritic spines.
- Literal: "Conversely, the signals obtained with either pRAICHU-RhoA and pRAICHU-Cdc42 were unchanged by the modifications of Rich2 expression (Fig. 3, D and E).". Experimental description: - Species of over-expressed rac1, Cdc42, RhoA Raichu probes is not explicitly stated in the paper. Species traced back to Matsuda lab. Matsuda lab was contacted for species information (matsudam@lif.kyoto-u.ac.jp; laurent.fagni@igf.cnrs.fr , dd. 12/12/2017)
